description_short: Little Rock is Arkansas's capital and largest city, sitting in a tornado-prone region with year-round severe weather risk.
description_long: Located on the Arkansas River in central Arkansas, Little Rock faces severe tornado and thunderstorm risk during the spring and a secondary winter peak typical of "Dixie Alley." Ice storms cause major disruption in winter. Pulaski County is served by NWS Little Rock (office code LZK) within forecast zone ARZ044 (Pulaski).
